templates.subject: Re: your request
templates.body:
Hi [Name],

Got it: [one line restate their ask].

Next step: [clarify questions / call / review specs] by [date].

Reply here if anything changes.

[Your name]
[Business]

templates.use_when: They named a tight deadline; you can respond today
templates.subject: Re: your timeline
templates.body:
Hi [Name],

I see you need this by [deadline]. I can confirm feasibility after [what you need from them] today.

If we cannot hit that date, I will say so plainly and offer the earliest real date.

[Your name]

templates.use_when: Vague scope; need three facts before quote
templates.body:
To route this right, can you reply with:
1) What delivered item you need (be specific)
2) Quantity or size
3) Deadline (hard or flexible)

Once I have those, I will come back with next steps (not a guess price).

templates.use_when: Scope partial; need budget band and date
templates.body:
Thanks for the detail on [deliverable]. Two quick items:

• Timeline: when do you need it?
• Budget band: which tier fits? [list tiers if you have them, or say ballpark helps routing]

Then I can tell you fit and timing honestly.

templates.use_when: You need internal review before pricing
templates.body:
Hi [Name],

I am reviewing [specs] against our queue. You will hear back by [date/time] with yes/no on timing and a clear quote or options.

No charge for this review step.

Hi [Name],

Thank you for thinking of us. This one is not a fit for us because [brief reason: capacity / specialty / geography].

[Optional referral: try X if you want Y.]

Wishing you the best with the project.

templates.use_when: They sent second message; you already answered
templates.body:
Hi [Name],

I sent a reply on [date] (subject: [subject]). Check spam if missing.

Short version: [one line next step].

Happy to jump on a call if easier: [phone or link].

templates.use_when: Success page or auto email after form submit
templates.body:
Request received. We read every submission. Expect a personal reply within [SLA hours] business hours.

What happens next: [one sentence process].

Urgent? [contact path].
